title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 17–18, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We'll teach you a lesson today!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No... it's the truth this time!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You say the same thing every- time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're taking advantage of our trust!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I know I joked around before!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But this time it's the truth! Believe me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you were an honest man like Clahador, then maybe I'd believe you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No matter what he says, no one will ever believe him!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Please believe me just this once, run away!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: pirates will really be here tomor- row!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: you guys... Thank you for all the help. We haven't met in three years

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: When this plan is through, we'll be rich for the rest of our lives!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Tomorrow morning, we'll destroy this village!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Woo- Hoo yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He said he was going to the next town

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
